pve_actions.name: Riposte
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 130.
Action upgraded to Enchanted Riposte if both Black Mana and White Mana are at 20 or more.

pve_actions.name: Jolt
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 170.
Additional Effect: Increases both Black Mana and White Mana by 2

pve_actions.name: Verthunder
pve_actions.effect:
Deals lightning damage with a potency of 360.
Additional Effect: Increases Black Mana by 6
Additional Effect: 50% chance of becoming Verfire Ready
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Corps-a-corps
pve_actions.effect:
Rushes target and delivers an attack with a potency of 130.
Maximum Charges: 2
Cannot be executed while bound.

pve_actions.name: Veraero
pve_actions.effect:
Deals wind damage with a potency of 360.
Additional Effect: Increases White Mana by 6
Additional Effect: 50% chance of becoming Verstone Ready
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Scatter
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 120 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Acceleration Potency: 170
Additional Effect: Increases both Black Mana and White Mana by 3

pve_actions.name: Verthunder II
pve_actions.effect:
Deals lightning damage with a potency of 140 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Additional Effect: Increases Black Mana by 7

pve_actions.name: Veraero II
pve_actions.effect:
Deals wind damage with a potency of 140 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Additional Effect: Increases White Mana by 7

pve_actions.name: Verfire
pve_actions.effect:
Deals fire damage with a potency of 380.
Additional Effect: Increases Black Mana by 5
Can only be executed while Verfire Ready is active.

pve_actions.name: Verstone
pve_actions.effect:
Deals earth damage with a potency of 380.
Additional Effect: Increases White Mana by 5
Can only be executed while Verstone Ready is active.

pve_actions.name: Zwerchhau
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100.
Combo Action: Riposte or Enchanted Riposte
Combo Potency: 150
Action upgraded to Enchanted Zwerchhau if both Black Mana and White Mana are at 15 or more.

pve_actions.name: Displacement
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 180.
Additional Effect: 15-yalm backstep
Maximum Charges: 2
Cannot be executed while bound.
Shares a recast timer with Engagement.

pve_actions.name: Engagement
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 180.
Maximum Charges: 2
Shares a recast timer with Displacement.

pve_actions.name: Fleche
pve_actions.effect: Delivers an attack with a potency of 480.

pve_actions.name: Redoublement
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100.
Combo Action: Zwerchhau or Enchanted Zwerchhau
Combo Potency: 230
Action upgraded to Enchanted Redoublement if both Black Mana and White Mana are at 15 or more.

pve_actions.name: Acceleration
pve_actions.effect:
Ensures the next Verthunder III, Veraero III, or Impact can be cast immediately.
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Increases the potency of Impact by 50
Additional Effect: Ensures Verthunder III and Veraero III trigger Verfire Ready or Verstone Ready respectively
Additional Effect: Grants Grand Impact Ready
Duration: 30s
Maximum Charges: 2

pve_actions.name: Moulinet
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 60 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Action upgraded to Enchanted Moulinet if both Black Mana and White Mana are at 20 or more.

pve_actions.name: Vercure
pve_actions.effect:
Restores target's HP.
Cure Potency: 350

pve_actions.name: Contre Sixte
pve_actions.effect: Delivers an attack with a potency of 420 to target and all enemies nearby it.

pve_actions.name: Embolden
pve_actions.effect:
Increases own magic damage dealt by 10% and damage dealt by nearby party members by 5%.
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Grants Thorned Flourish
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Manafication
pve_actions.effect:
Temporarily increases the ranges of Enchanted Riposte, Enchanted Zwerchhau, and Enchanted Redoublement to 25 yalms.
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants 3 stacks of Magicked Swordplay, each stack allowing the use of Enchanted Riposte, Enchanted Zwerchhau, Enchanted Redoublement, Enchanted Moulinet, Enchanted Moulinet Deux, or Enchanted Moulinet Trois without cost
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants Prefulgence Ready
Duration: 30s
All combos are canceled upon execution of Manafication.
Can only be executed while in combat.

pve_actions.name: Jolt II
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 280.
Additional Effect: Increases both Black Mana and White Mana by 2

pve_actions.name: Verraise
pve_actions.effect: Resurrects target to a weakened state.

pve_actions.name: Impact
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 210 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Acceleration Potency: 260
Additional Effect: Increases both Black Mana and White Mana by 3

pve_actions.name: Verflare
pve_actions.effect:
Deals fire damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 650 for the first enemy, and 55% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Increases Black Mana by 11
Additional Effect: 20% chance of becoming Verfire Ready
Duration: 30s
Chance to become Verfire Ready increases to 100% if White Mana is higher than Black Mana at time of execution.
Mana Stack Cost: 3

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Verthunder III and Verthunder II change to Verflare when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Verholy
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 650 for the first enemy, and 55% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Increases White Mana by 11
Additional Effect: 20% chance of becoming Verstone Ready
Duration: 30s
Chance to become Verstone Ready increases to 100% if Black Mana is higher than White Mana at time of execution.
Mana Stack Cost: 3

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Veraero III and Veraero II change to Verholy when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Reprise
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100.
Action upgraded to Enchanted Reprise if both Black Mana and White Mana are at 5 or more.

pve_actions.name: Scorch
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 750 for the first enemy, and 55% less for all remaining enemies.
Combo Action: Verflare or Verholy
Additional Effect: Increases both Black Mana and White Mana by 4
Can only be executed after successfully landing Verflare or Verholy as a combo action.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Jolt III and Impact change to Scorch when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Verthunder III
pve_actions.effect:
Deals lightning damage with a potency of 440.
Additional Effect: Increases Black Mana by 6
Additional Effect: 50% chance of becoming Verfire Ready
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Veraero III
pve_actions.effect:
Deals wind damage with a potency of 440.
Additional Effect: Increases White Mana by 6
Additional Effect: 50% chance of becoming Verstone Ready
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Jolt III
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 360.
Additional Effect: Increases both Black Mana and White Mana by 2

pve_actions.name: Magick Barrier
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces magic damage taken by self and nearby party members by 10%, while increasing HP recovered by healing actions by 5%.
Duration: 10s

pve_actions.name: Resolution
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to all enemies in a straight line before you with a potency of 850 for the first enemy, and 55% less for all remaining enemies.
Combo Action: Scorch
Additional Effect: Increases both Black Mana and White Mana by 4
Can only be executed after successfully landing Scorch as a combo action.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Scorch changes to Resolution when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Vice of Thorns
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 950 for the first enemy, and 55% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Thorned Flourish.

pve_actions.name: Grand Impact
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 600 for the first enemy, and 55% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Increases both Black Mana and White Mana by 3
Can only be executed while under the effect of Grand Impact Ready.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Jolt III and Impact change to Grand Impact when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Prefulgence
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 1,200 for the first enemy, and 55% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Prefulgence Ready.

pve_actions.name: Enchanted Riposte
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 340.
Additional Effect: Grants a Mana Stack
Balance Gauge Cost: 20 Black Mana
Balance Gauge Cost: 20 White Mana

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Riposte changes to Enchanted Riposte when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Enchanted Zwerchhau
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 190.
Combo Action: Riposte or Enchanted Riposte
Combo Potency: 380
Additional Effect: Grants a Mana Stack
Balance Gauge Cost: 15 Black Mana
Balance Gauge Cost: 15 White Mana

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Zwerchhau changes to Enchanted Zwerchhau when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Enchanted Redoublement
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 190.
Combo Action: Enchanted Zwerchhau
Combo Potency: 560
Additional Effect: Grants a Mana Stack
Balance Gauge Cost: 15 Black Mana
Balance Gauge Cost: 15 White Mana

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Redoublement changes to Enchanted Redoublement when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Enchanted Moulinet
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 130 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Additional Effect: Grants a Mana Stack
Balance Gauge Cost: 20 Black Mana
Balance Gauge Cost: 20 White Mana

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Moulinet changes to Enchanted Moulinet when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Enchanted Moulinet Deux
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 140 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Combo Action: Enchanted Moulinet
Additional Effect: Grants a Mana Stack
Balance Gauge Cost: 15 Black Mana
Balance Gauge Cost: 15 White Mana

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Enchanted Moulinet changes to Enchanted Moulinet Deux when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Enchanted Moulinet Trois
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 150 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Combo Action: Enchanted Moulinet Deux
Additional Effect: Grants a Mana Stack
Balance Gauge Cost: 15 Black Mana
Balance Gauge Cost: 15 White Mana

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Enchanted Moulinet Deux changes to Enchanted Moulinet Trois when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Enchanted Reprise
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 420.
Balance Gauge Cost: 5 Black Mana
Balance Gauge Cost: 5 White Mana

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Reprise changes to Enchanted Reprise when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Addle
pve_actions.effect:
Lowers target's physical damage dealt by 5% and magic damage dealt by 10%.
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Sleep
pve_actions.effect:
Puts target and all nearby enemies to sleep.
Duration: 30s
Cancels auto-attack upon execution.

pve_actions.name: Lucid Dreaming
pve_actions.effect:
Gradually restores own MP.
Potency: 55
Duration: 21s

pve_actions.name: Swiftcast
pve_actions.effect:
Next spell is cast immediately.
Duration: 10s

pve_actions.name: Surecast
pve_actions.effect:
Spells can be cast without interruption.
Additional Effect: Nullifies most knockback and draw-in effects
Duration: 6s

traits.name: Dualcast
traits.effect:
Grants the effect of Dualcast upon casting any spell with a cast time. While under the effect of Dualcast, your next spell will require no time to cast. Effect is canceled upon execution of any action other than an ability. Auto-attacks do not cancel effect.
Duration: 15s

traits.name: Maim and Mend
traits.effect: Increases base action damage and HP restoration by 10%.

traits.name: Maim and Mend II
traits.effect: Increases base action damage and HP restoration by 30%.

traits.name: Enhanced Jolt
traits.effect: Upgrades Jolt to Jolt II. Also increases the potency of Verthunder and Veraero to 360, and the potency of Verfire and Verstone to 300.

traits.name: Mana Stack
traits.effect:
Adds a Mana Stack to your Balance Gauge upon landing Enchanted Riposte, Enchanted Zwerchhau, Enchanted Redoublement, Enchanted Moulinet, Enchanted Moulinet Deux, or Enchanted Moulinet Trois, up to a maximum of 3.
Upon gaining 3 Mana Stacks, Verthunder and Verthunder II are upgraded to Verflare.
Upon learning Verholy, gaining 3 Mana Stacks also upgrades Veraero and Veraero II to Verholy.

traits.name: Enhanced Displacement
traits.effect: Increases Displacement and Engagement potency to 180.

traits.name: Red Magic Mastery
traits.effect: Reduces Contre Sixte recast timer to 35 seconds and increases the potency of both Verthunder II and Veraero II to 120.

traits.name: Red Magic Mastery II
traits.effect:
Upgrades Verthunder to Verthunder III and Veraero to Veraero III.
Upon gaining 3 Mana Stacks, Verthunder III is upgraded to Verflare and Veraero III is upgraded to Verholy.

traits.name: Red Magic Mastery III
traits.effect: Upgrades Jolt II to Jolt III. Also increases the potency of Enchanted Riposte to 280, Verthunder II to 140, Veraero II to 140, Verfire to 340, Verstone to 340, Enchanted Zwerchhau to 150, Enchanted Redoublement to 130, Impact to 210, and Enchanted Reprise to 340.

traits.name: Enhanced Acceleration
traits.effect:
Allows the accumulation of charges for consecutive uses of Acceleration.
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Enhanced Embolden
traits.effect:
Grants Thorned Flourish upon executing Embolden.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enchanted Blade Mastery
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Enchanted Riposte to 340, Verfire to 380, Verstone to 380, Enchanted Zwerchhau to 190, Fleche to 480, Enchanted Redoublement to 190, Contre Sixte to 420, Verflare to 650, Verholy to 650, Enchanted Reprise to 420, Scorch to 750, Veraero III to 440, Verthunder III to 440, and Resolution to 850.

traits.name: Enhanced Acceleration II
traits.effect:
Grants Grand Impact Ready upon executing Acceleration.
Duration: 30s
Jolt III and Impact change to Grand Impact while under the effect of Grand Impact Ready.

traits.name: Enhanced Manafication
traits.effect:
Grants Prefulgence Ready upon executing Manafication.
Duration: 30s
Manafication changes to Prefulgence while under the effect of Prefulgence Ready.

traits.name: Enhanced Swiftcast
traits.effect: Reduces Swiftcast recast time to 40 seconds.

traits.name: Enhanced Addle
traits.effect: Extends the duration of Addle to 15 seconds.
